cli.select_trip_commands:
[1-99]       Select and render a specific trip
  [t]          Toggle show/hide rendered trips
  [r]          Render all unrendered trips
  [ra]         Render all trips (including rendered)
  [c]          Clear cache (remove all rendered marks)
  [0]          Exit
cli.command_help:
======================================================================
  AVAILABLE COMMANDS
======================================================================
  cancel        - Exit the program
  clear-cache   - Clear rendered trips cache
  stop          - During rendering: type 'stop' + Enter to abort
  trips         - Show all trips

  render [flags] [selection]   (or 'r' for short)
    Flags:
      -a, --all           Include already rendered trips (redundant; default includes rendered)
      -ur, --unrendered   Only unrendered trips (use to restrict)
      -y YEAR             Filter by year (e.g., -y 2025)
      -d START;END        Date range (dd.mm.yyyy;dd.mm.yyyy)
      -config(KEY=VALUE,...)  Override config for this render (e.g., -config(map_style="road", max_photos_per_step=4))

    Selection formats:
      1           Single trip
      1;4         Range of trips (1 to 4)
      1,5,6       Multiple trips
      l or last   Last trip
      l-1         Second to last trip

  Examples:
    # Always provide either a selection or -a/-ur
    r -a                      Render all trips (including rendered)
    r -ur -y 2025             Render unrendered trips from 2025
    r -d 01.01.2025;01.06.2025 -ur   Render trips in date range (only unrendered)
    r 1;4                     Render trips 1 through 4
    r -a l                    Render last trip (even if rendered)
    r 1,3,5                   Render trips 1, 3, and 5
    r 67 -config(map_style="street", max_photos_per_step=4)  Render trip 67 with overrides
======================================================================
cli.stats_help:
stats [flags] (short: 's')   Show statistics for trips
    Flags:
      -y YEAR             Filter by year (e.g. -y 2025). The full calendar year is
                         used when reporting travel/non-travel days.
                         Travel counts are always capped at the current date; future dates are ignored.
      -d START;END        Date range (dd.mm.yyyy;dd.mm.yyyy). Trips that overlap any
                         part of this interval are included; the output period and
                         ratios reflect the entire range, not just the days with
                         travel entries.
                         Travel counts still stop at today.
      -ur, --unrendered   Only unrendered trips

  Examples:
    s -y 2025              Show statistics for 2025 (confirmation required)
    s -d 01.01.2025;01.06.2025 -ur   Stats for date range (only unrendered)

cli.argparse_description: Polarsteps PDF Generator - Render travel journals from Polarsteps data
cli.argparse_epilog:
Available commands (at the prompt):
  cancel        Exit the program
  clear-cache   Clear rendered trips cache
  stop          During rendering: type 'stop' + Enter to abort

  render [flags] [selection]   (or 'r' for short)
    Flags:
      -a, --all           Include already rendered trips (redundant; default includes already rendered)
      -ur, --unrendered   Only unrendered trips (use to restrict)
      -y YEAR             Filter by year (e.g., -y 2025)
      -d START;END        Date range (dd.mm.yyyy;dd.mm.yyyy)
      -config(KEY=VALUE,...)  Override config for this render (e.g., -config(map_style="road", max_photos_per_step=4))
      l-1         Second to last trip

Examples:
  # Always provide either a selection or -a/-ur
  r -a                Render all trips (including rendered)
  r -ur -y 2025       Render unrendered trips from 2025
  r -d 01.01.2025;01.06.2025 -ur   Render trips in date range (only unrendered)
  r 1;4               Render trips 1 through 4
  r -a l              Render last trip (even if rendered)
  r 1,3,5             Render trips 1, 3, and 5
